chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1351 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 17-11-2022 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for Pakistan Railways. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner who is widow of late Pervaiz Masih, an employee of Pakistan Railways, who died on 08-12-2016 during his service, through instant petition has sought directions to respondents to issue an amount of Rs.20,00,000/- (Rupees twenty lac) in lieu of plot / flat / house under the Prime Minister’s Family Assistance Package announced for the families of Government employees who died during service. Today, para-wise comments on behalf of respondent No.7 are filed by learned Counsel for respondent-Pakistan Railways through his statement, which reflects that as per priority list, the name of the petitioner falls at Serial No.29 out of 41. Since the claim of the petitioner for aforesaid Prime Minister’s Assistance Package is admitted by the respondents-Pakistan Railways, this petition is disposed of by directing the said respondents to pay the aforesaid amount to the petitioner within two months hereof. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
